response.global_analysis: The audio features a medley performance of 'Isekai Concerto' followed by 'CIRCUS PANIC!!!', bridged by a narrative dialogue sequence. I used the burnt-in on-screen lyrics as the primary guide for transcription to ensure 100% accuracy in spelling and intent. Timestamps were strictly aligned to the vocal onset and offset, with mid-sentence pauses in the dialogue section handled by splitting the text into discrete blocks. The reference JSON was largely ignored for content as it lacked the specific lyrics, but confirmed the song titles. All visual text punchlines were captured.

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない！
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I won't laugh!

subtitles.original: 正直に生きるお前が貶されて
subtitles.english: You who live honestly are disparaged

subtitles.original: 嘘で生きる奴らが徳となる世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live by lies are rewarded

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前の腕を離さない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not let go of your arm!

subtitles.original: 時を刻み忘れようとも我は離さない！
subtitles.english: Even if we forget to keep time, I won't let go!

subtitles.original: 我は忘れない！
subtitles.english: I won't forget!

subtitles.original: 身を粉にして働いても
subtitles.english: Even if I work myself to the bone

subtitles.original: 感謝されないことも……（シパシパ）
subtitles.english: There are times I'm not thanked... (Shiba-shiba)

subtitles.original: 「自己犠牲」を受け入れも
subtitles.english: Even if I accept "self-sacrifice"

subtitles.original: 限界がもうやってくるから
subtitles.english: Because my limit is already approaching

subtitles.original: 自分を大事に愛せばいい
subtitles.english: You just need to love and value yourself

subtitles.original: それは他人を愛すること
subtitles.english: That is what it means to love others

subtitles.original: ああ人は溢れてゆく 淀んでゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people overflow, becoming stagnant

subtitles.original: 元に戻ってゆく
subtitles.english: Returning to how they were

subtitles.original: ああ人は泳いでゆく 救われてゆく
subtitles.english: Ah, people swim through, being saved

subtitles.original: 君に逢えたから……
subtitles.english: Because I was able to meet you...

subtitles.original: 君を愛したから……
subtitles.english: Because I loved you...

subtitles.original: 君が戦うなら……
subtitles.english: If you are going to fight...

subtitles.original: 僕も戦うから！
subtitles.english: Then I will fight too!

subtitles.original: 我武者羅に生きるお前が笑われて
subtitles.english: You who live recklessly are laughed at

subtitles.original: 楽に生きる奴らが徳をする世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live easily benefit

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前のことを笑わない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not laugh at you!

subtitles.original: 皆が指差し笑おうとも我は笑わない！
subtitles.english: Even if everyone points and laughs, I won't laugh!

subtitles.original: 正直に生きるお前が貶されて
subtitles.english: You who live honestly are disparaged

subtitles.original: 嘘で生きる奴らが徳となる世界で
subtitles.english: In a world where those who live by lies are rewarded

subtitles.original: 我だけはお前の腕を離さない！
subtitles.english: I alone will not let go of your arm!

subtitles.original: 時を刻み忘れようとも我は離さない！
subtitles.english: Even if we forget to keep time, I won't let go!

subtitles.original: 我は離さない！
subtitles.english: I won't let go!

subtitles.original: 我は忘れない！
subtitles.english: I won't forget!

subtitles.original: それんじゃ今夜は、この王国のお話をしていこう。
subtitles.english: Well then, tonight, let's talk about this kingdom.

subtitles.original: 嘘か真か、
subtitles.english: Whether it's a lie or the truth,

subtitles.original: ここに記されている本は内容がコロコロと変わってしまう、不思議な本でね。
subtitles.english: the contents of the book recorded here change all the time; it's a mysterious book, you see.

subtitles.original: さて、今回はどんなお話になっているかな。
subtitles.english: Now, I wonder what kind of story it's become this time.

subtitles.original: これはあるサーカスの一団が王国へ訪れ、
subtitles.english: This is a story of a certain circus troupe visiting a kingdom,

subtitles.original: まだ未熟な座長さんが綺羅びやかなステージに包まれたお話。
subtitles.english: and a story of a still inexperienced ringmaster being embraced by a glittering stage.

subtitles.original: ああ…これが私が望んだ夢のエンディング！
subtitles.english: Ah... this is the dream ending I desired!

subtitles.original: さあ、今日も始まりました～！
subtitles.english: Now, it's starting today too~!

subtitles.original: 煌びやか、享楽のパレード
subtitles.english: A glittering, hedonistic parade

subtitles.original: 常識もここでは無関係
subtitles.english: Common sense is irrelevant here

subtitles.original: 踊れ歌え騒げ全て忘れて
subtitles.english: Dance, sing, make a racket, and forget everything

subtitles.original: 細かいことは置いといて
subtitles.english: Leave the small details aside

subtitles.original: とりあえず身を任せてみな
subtitles.english: For now, just try surrendering yourself

subtitles.original: 幸福を少し分けるような饗宴
subtitles.english: A banquet that seems to share a bit of happiness

subtitles.original: Show Time!
subtitles.english: Show Time!

subtitles.original: 積もりゆく不安や後悔
subtitles.english: Accumulating anxiety and regret

subtitles.original: 今だけはちょっと目を背けて
subtitles.english: Just for now, look away a little

subtitles.original: そのままじゃ楽しめないじゃん この場だけは何もかも忘れて
subtitles.english: You can't enjoy it like that, can you? Just here, forget everything

subtitles.original: 幾千の価値観全部 引っ括め楽しませたげる！
subtitles.english: I'll bundle up all the thousands of values and make you have fun!

subtitles.original: 百鬼夜行もビックリの 隊を成している
subtitles.english: Forming a procession that would even surprise a night parade of 100 demons

subtitles.original: 怪奇模した戯劇が幕開け
subtitles.english: The opening of a comedy imitating the bizarre

subtitles.original: 一目見ればたちまち虜に！？
subtitles.english: If you take one look, you'll instantly be captivated!?

subtitles.original: どんな愛も受け入れてくれる
subtitles.english: It accepts any kind of love

subtitles.original: ここだけはあなたの理想郷
subtitles.english: This place alone is your utopia

subtitles.original: 「もう間もなく主役の登場、一時でも目を離さないで！」
subtitles.english: “Very soon, the star appears—don't look away for even a moment!”

subtitles.original: 眩いほどのステージが始まる。
subtitles.english: The dazzling stage begins.

subtitles.original: 華々しいスポットライトの中
subtitles.english: In the middle of the magnificent spotlight

subtitles.original: 目を奪うような妙技の数々
subtitles.english: Numerous eye-catching feats

subtitles.original: この空間が世界で一番 “娯楽”の名に相応しいんだ！
subtitles.english: This space is the most worthy in the world of the name "entertainment"!

subtitles.original: 割れんばかりの歓声と拍手で ショーは終わっていく
subtitles.english: With thunderous cheers and applause, the show comes to an end

subtitles.original: ↑まあ、これはあくまで理想の話なんですが^^;
subtitles.english: ↑Well, this is just an ideal story, though... ^^;
